recent_player_actions.text: Galinor approaches the tavern runner. "Runner, I'm here to save the city. What can you tell me about the missing patrol?"
"Courage, runner. I need something, anything. You can trust me."
Galinor nods and approaches a nearby guard. "I've heard some of your comrades went missing near the old crossroads. Is that true?"
Galinor walks back to the Runner. "Can you believe these Watchmen? They're too chicken to have each others backs!"

frontier_gate.last_player_action_text: Galinor walks back to the Runner. "Can you believe these Watchmen? They're too chicken to have each others backs!"

recent_contextual_leads.subject: guards eye the crowd with unease, clearly on alert for trouble
tavern runner yells announcements about hot stew and rumors of a missing patrol, trying to catch the attention of the weary souls around

missing_patrol.last_answer:
The Tavern Runner shakes her head, a grave expression crossing her face. "You think it’s just the Watchmen? I’ve heard rumors there’s something more lurking out there. Strange sightings by the old milestone, shadows moving where they shouldn’t be. If you're looking for answers, maybe checking that place isn’t a bad start. But be careful—people go missing there too."

She glances around, lowering her voice. "And there's talk—some say Lord Aldric has been seen near there. Might
